inputs.text: RAW photo, ultra realistic skin texture, stunning Korean idol woman with chestnut brown high ponytail, baby face with natural aegyo-sal under-eye charm, bright cheerful smile showing perfect teeth, flawless porcelain skin with dewy finish, soft styled makeup with peachy blush and gradient coral lips, wearing retro 90s oversized denim jacket with vintage band tee underneath, bust shot shoulders up, shot on 50mm lens, eye-level straight on, candlelight warm intimate glow casting golden amber tones across her face, autumn park background with falling maple leaves in bokeh, gentle warm breeze lifting loose strands of hair, nostalgic dreamy atmosphere, natural window light mixing with candle warmth, sharp focus on eyes, creamy shallow depth of field, no text, no watermarks
